title: PvP Akame Pack + Anime Sky
description: PvP/CPvP resource pack that replaces the custom sky, menu, small items, GUI, animated inventory, item textures, totem, and sounds. Based on a red theme.
body:
![OSN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0c53f8ca181e3b02865d2131675054f3763069e.png)
## This anime PvP resource pack in a red theme replaces or adds the following features:
- Animated inventory
- Custom GUI
- Main menu background
- Totem
- Custom sword
- Crystals
- Customized sky
- Item textures
- Particles
- Inventory has been updated
- New widgets
- Small Items
## The best version for this resource pack is 1.21.x and above.
**On older versions, textures may display incorrectly or be completely missing. 
I will fix this issue soon.**
## For sky overlays to work correctly on Fabric, you will need the following mods:
1. [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/project/YBz7DOs8)
2. [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/project/DWuwk8aA)
### The resource pack will be supplemented according to your requests!!! ⬇
[Your ideas](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc7acRNZqvBLNuGPTNGDZCw5bucHUnClBbeEwJO-Twb5f7lyw/viewform?usp=publish-editor)
